name: @qeet-pay/root
description: Qeet Pay — repo tooling (project-tree generation). Backend is Gradle/Java; the checkout app lives under apps/ and is managed with bun.

scripts.generate:tree: struct -i node_modules -i .next -i .output -i .tanstack -i .nitro -i dist -i build -i .gradle -i bin -i target -i bun.lock -i .venv -i .pytest_cache -i __pycache__ -i .ruff_cache -i .turbo -i .git -d -o project.tree
scripts.generate:tree:all: bun run generate:tree && bun run generate:tree:checkout
